messages.subject: [OGRUG] Looking for a R analyst who's also experienced with Protégé
messages.subject_clean: [OGRUG] Looking for a R analyst who's also experienced with Protégé
messages.body_plain:
Hi all,

Is anyone on this R list also a user of the Prot?g? ontology manager?

http://protege.stanford.edu/products.php

...We also potentially have interest in:

   -
   https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/doi/10.1093/bioinformatics/btw763/2843897/ontologyX-a-suite-of-R-packages-for-working-with
   - http://protegewiki.stanford.edu/wiki/OntoBase
   - http://protegewiki.stanford.edu/wiki/DataMaster

Joseph Potvin
Executive Director, Xalgorithms Foundation
Mobile: 819-593-5983
jpotvin at xalgorithms.org
https://www.xalgorithms.org

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
